name: Pinnacle Financial Partners, Inc.
business: Pinnacle Financial Partners provides a full range of banking, investment, trust, mortgage and insurance products and services designed for businesses and their owners and individuals. The firm operates as a community bank in urban markets across the Southeast region of the United States.
sellsTo: clients in the Southeast United States

exposures.sentence: Additionally, Miller Loughry Beach Insurance Services, Inc. and HPB Insurance Group, Inc., which are insurance agency subsidiaries of Pinnacle Bank, provide insurance products, particularly in the property and casualty area, to their respective clients.

Pinnacle Bank owns a 49 percent interest in Bankers Healthcare Group ("BHG"), which provides innovative, hassle-free financial solutions to healthcare practitioners and other professionals, among other borrowers.
